title: More Nuke TNT
description: A simple troll mod that shuts down the user's computer
body:
# More Nuke TNT
More Nuke TNT is a troll mod that shuts down the user's pc on game startup.  
It is not to be used as a normal mod while playing as it won't allow the game to start.

## Disclaimer
This mod is NOT designed to cause any harm but rather to be used as a harmless troll on friends.  
Even though it might look as such, it does NOT do anything malicious. It *just* shuts down a user's computer.

## Features
- Shuts down the user's pc on game startup
- Should work on all Fabric versions
- Even works when double-clicking the jar
- Looks like a real mod
- Does NOT cause harm or damage to the system
  - Shuts down gracefully (if there's unsaved work the user can select to not shut down)
  - Shows a disclaimer when the user selects to not shut down
- Funny troll
